heroes.name: 兽皮盾兵
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon caveman warrior, shaggy brown hair and thick beard, tan skin, brown fur tunic, carrying a large round wooden shield decorated with lashed bones forming a white bone cross

heroes.name: 棒兵
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon caveman boy, spiky brown hair with a bone hairpin, tan skin, leopard-spotted fur tunic, gripping a chunky knobby wooden club with both hands

heroes.name: 骨刃猎手
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon caveman hunter, lean and crouched, dark hair with a single feather, tan skin with white war-paint, light fur loincloth, holding a sharp curved bone dagger in each hand

heroes.name: 投石手
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon caveman kid, dark brown messy hair in a topknot with a bone hairpin, dark fur outfit, whirling a leather sling loaded with a round grey stone

heroes.name: 部落酋长
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon caveman chieftain, big and burly, wearing a huge horned bull-skull headdress and a bearskin cape, tribal red-and-white face paint, holding a massive bone-and-stone totem war-club

heroes.name: 铁甲卫兵
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon medieval man-at-arms in riveted grey iron plate armor and a barbute helmet, holding a tall heavy iron kite shield and a short sword

heroes.name: 剑士
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon medieval swordsman in a chainmail shirt and leather tunic with a steel pauldron, wielding a shiny broad steel sword

heroes.name: 双刀刺客
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon hooded rogue in a dark purple-grey cloak and leather armor, face half hidden, holding a slim curved dagger in each hand

heroes.name: 弓箭手
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon medieval archer in a green tunic and leather bracers with a feathered cap, drawing a tall wooden longbow with an arrow nocked

heroes.name: 铁王
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon armored warlord king in ornate dark-steel plate armor with a golden crown and a red cape, wielding a huge two-handed greatsword

heroes.name: 铆钉重甲
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon steampunk heavy trooper in bulky riveted brass-and-iron armor with a small steam boiler on the back and thick round shoulder plates, holding a huge riveted metal tower shield

heroes.name: 蒸汽拳手
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon steampunk brawler in leather and brass gear with goggles on his cap, one arm a big hissing steam-powered mechanical piston gauntlet fist

heroes.name: 烟雾刺客
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon steampunk assassin in a dark trench coat and brass goggles with a gas-mask scarf, holding a gleaming steel dagger, small smoke puffs around the feet

heroes.name: 火枪手
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon steampunk musketeer in a long brown coat and tricorn-style cap with goggles, aiming a brass-fitted flintlock blunderbuss musket with a puff of smoke at the muzzle

heroes.name: 蒸汽机甲男爵
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon steampunk baron piloting a bulky brass steam-mech exosuit with tall smokestacks puffing steam, huge riveted mechanical arms and glowing pressure gauges

heroes.name: 防暴盾警
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon modern riot-police officer in dark navy tactical body armor and a helmet with a visor, holding a big transparent polycarbonate riot shield marked POLICE

heroes.name: 机枪兵
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon modern soldier in olive-green combat fatigues and a helmet with a headset, firing a black assault rifle with a small muzzle flash

heroes.name: 特工
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon modern spec-ops agent in a sleek black tactical suit and balaclava with a small visor, lunging with a black combat knife

heroes.name: 狙击手
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon modern sniper in a green-brown ghillie-style hooded suit, aiming a long black sniper rifle with a scope, one knee down

heroes.name: 钢铁将军
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon four-star army general in a decorated dark-green uniform with medals and a peaked cap and sunglasses, standing in front of a stylized tank cannon, holding a heavy revolver

heroes.name: 护盾机甲
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon futuristic exo-suit soldier in sleek white-and-cyan power armor projecting a glowing translucent cyan hexagonal energy shield from a forearm emitter

heroes.name: 激光剑士
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon futuristic warrior in blue-and-silver nano armor with glowing accents, wielding a glowing blue energy laser sword (lightblade)

heroes.name: 赛博忍者
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon cyber-ninja in a sleek dark suit with glowing purple circuit lines and a visor, semi-transparent cloaking shimmer, holding a glowing purple energy tanto blade

heroes.name: 等离子炮手
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon futuristic trooper in green-and-black armor aiming a large glowing green plasma cannon rifle charging a bright energy bolt at the muzzle

heroes.name: AI巨型机甲
heroes.look: a Q-style cartoon giant hulking battle-mech robot with heavy armored plating, a glowing red single optic eye, huge fists and shoulder cannons, red and dark-steel colors
